Container.Name: CrossWatch
Container.Overview: CrossWatch synchronizes watchlists, ratings, history and playback progress between Plex, Jellyfin, Emby and many trackers.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: Plex Jellyfin Emby SIMKL Trakt AniList TMDb MDBList Tautulli watchlist ratings history playback progress scrobble synchronization
Container.Requires: At least one supported media server or tracking service account.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port used to access the CrossWatch web interface.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent CrossWatch configuration and application data, mounted inside the container at /config.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone used for scheduling and displayed timestamps.

Config.Name: User ID
Config.Description: Numeric user ID used to run CrossWatch. The Unraid default is 99.

Config.Name: Group ID
Config.Description: Numeric group ID used to run CrossWatch. The Unraid default is 100.
